blocks.content: The snowball was hard enough to make his head ring.
Moreover, he was standing on slippery ice.
Unable to keep his balance, Jokre fell forward.
The shock was brief, and anger surged.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Who dared to play such a prank?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: What the... Who did that?
Jokre touched the back of his head and turned around.
A gray-haired boy stood outside the skating rink, casually tossing snowballs.
In his other hand, he held an iced coffee, quite out of place in the cold weather.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: No matter how unpopular you are with girls, you shouldn't mess with a couple on a date.
Jokre squinted at the familiar face.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Isn't that... Dante? Airhain Dante.
Dante entered the rink with his shoes on, gliding smoothly on one leg as he pushed off the ice.
Rudvans and Vivian instinctively stepped aside to let him pass.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: No way. It's really Dante?
Since she entered magic school, Dante had never lost his position as the kingdom's top student.
When the news of his defeat by Shirone was published in the journal, every student in the kingdom was shocked.
Jokre, too, had once clipped articles about Dante and pasted them in his notebook, fueling his determination.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But how long could he cling to memories of his school days?
Above all, being hit on the back of the head before even introducing himself was a lifetime humiliation.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Hey, you...
Dante ignored Jokre and approached Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Long time no see, Shirone. And Amy.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Oh, so now you're calling your seniors by name?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Haha! We'll be in the same graduating class next semester anyway.
Amy wasn't really upset.
During the 2000th duel, Dante had treated her with utmost respect, so his friendly attitude now felt a bit awkward.
But Dante's personality was so cool that he seemed to have already erased those memories from his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fancy seeing you here. What brings you?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: As you can see, I'm here to have fun. I travel every vacation. It's my first time in Creas. Someone recommended the winter festival.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I see. Did you come alone? What about Closer and Sabina?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: They started special training as soon as vacation began. By now, they must be realizing what hell is. They're exhausting to hang out with.
Dante shrugged, and Shirone burst into laughter.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He had been wondering if it was okay to have fun, but seeing Dante's relaxed demeanor made his own worries seem insignificant.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dante, you're amazing as always.
Sometimes, when he recalled the 2000th duel, Shirone was astonished that he had defeated Dante.
Beyond magic, Dante had star quality. The ability to captivate people's attention wasn't something that could be achieved through effort alone.
As expected of someone from the capital, Vashka, he dressed well.
He wore a blue coat, black skinny pants, and a purple scarf, looking both understated and radiant.
He even had a piercing in one ear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For someone like Shirone, who was clueless about fashion, it was surprising.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But Jokre thought differently.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: He had been completely ignored.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: In front of Amy, no less. Or rather, in front of Amy's boyfriend, Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: What angered him the most was how bright Shirone, Amy, and Dante looked together.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Geniuses only hang out with other geniuses? Seeing them together is really annoying.
Jokre took a deep breath and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Hey, Dante.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Hmm?
Dante turned around, sipping his drink, seemingly having forgotten what he had done earlier.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: If you hit someone, shouldn't you apologize? Especially to a senior mage.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: A senior? Who are you?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Jokre, a graduate of Eins Magic School. I'm not just some promising student like you.
Dante blinked, still sipping his drink.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: The longer Dante remained silent, the more anxious Jokre became.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: He couldn't help but imagine what Dante might be thinking.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Of course, Eins Magic School was Jokre's beloved alma mater, and he had no shame in choosing to transfer.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But Dante was from the Royal Magic School.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: The kingdom's top institution.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Although he was now attending Alpheas Magic School to avenge his defeat by Shirone, it was still one of the top five schools.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Moreover, he had been the direct disciple of Olivia, a certified second-grade archmage, so Jokre knew he wouldn't be noticed.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Sorry, never heard of you. And you're the one bothering a couple having fun.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: You...!
Jokre's eyes flared.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: The words 'never heard of you' pierced his heart like a thorn.
Rudvans and Vivian, who had hoped their names were known in the minor leagues, also looked coldly at Dante.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Dante, don't be mistaken. Do you think you're something special? You're just a student. And you were thoroughly defeated by Shirone. Shirone, who is a commoner. And Amy, who was hailed as a genius, is just a repeat student.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: You really know a lot.
Dante's expression didn't change as he spoke.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: That's the difference between you and us. We're featured in the journal, and you buy it to read about us.
Shirone's face burned with embarrassment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If he liked witty remarks, Dante mercilessly trampled on his opponent's weaknesses.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was cool if you were on his side, but hell for the other party.
As expected, Jokre's group's faces twisted, and their eyes showed a hint of murderous intent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If they intended to provoke, it worked perfectly, but knowing it wasn't their intention made Shirone worry.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Damn it! Damn it! Damn it!

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Jokre was furious. Why was he being treated like this?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Logically, the roles should be reversed.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: The successful graduate should be the one flaunting, while they should look at him with jealousy and envy.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Hmph! Pathetic fools! Do they think a school's reputation will live their lives for them?
Jokre glared at Shirone's group, wondering how to make them submit.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Huh? What's that...
He noticed something shiny under Shirone's coat.
Upon closer inspection, it was a sword sheath.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Why is he carrying a sword at a festival? And isn't he a commoner? Is he allowed to carry a weapon?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Jokre pondered the reason.
Then, realizing something, he burst into laughter.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Hahaha! So that's it. You're just the same.
As Jokre's demeanor suddenly changed, Dante stepped back, seemingly intimidated.
Ignoring him, Jokre pointed at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Acting all confident, but you're just insecure. Why else would a commoner carry a sword? I guess you wanted to match your noble girlfriend.
Vivian looked and gasped.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Oh, it's true? But isn't that illegal?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Of course it's illegal! How can a commoner carry a sword? And you think you can talk big?
Jokre approached Shirone and opened his coat.
Since it was a serious crime for a commoner to carry a sword, he didn't hesitate.
As the buttons tore off and the coat opened, the silver sheath of Armand was revealed at his waist.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Just as I thought. Pathetic. Do you think this will make you a noble?
Shirone's eyes turned cold.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Step back. And compensate for my coat.
Shirone desperately tried to control his emotions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The inner monster, sensing his anger, was trying to emerge again.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But Jokre, feeling victorious, continued talking.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: No decorations and short. It must be cheap. Well, where would someone like you get an expensive sword...
Jokre reached for the handle.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Since it was short, the blade would be unimpressive. He planned to draw it and repay the humiliation he had suffered.
But his thoughts ended there.
With a swishing sound, Jokre's movements stopped. His arms slowly rose.
His eyes trembled with shock, and his skin prickled with cold.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: This... this is...
Rudvans and Vivian's faces turned pale with shock.
Shirone's sword had drawn itself and was now pressed against Jokre's throat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What... how did the sword...
Not because he was angry at Jokre.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If he had been even a moment late in controlling his emotions, Jokre's head would have been rolling on the ice.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I was too complacent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The precise control was an impressive feature, but its synchronization was so perfect that it was influenced by the demon's actions in the first layer of his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone was a mage who had trained his mind to remain calm in any situation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But that didn't mean he had no emotional changes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In a fleeting moment of anger, Armand had drawn itself.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His disappointment in himself made Shirone even angrier.
Sensing its master's anger, Armand trembled, and Jokre heard the sword's wailing through his eardrums.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is your final warning. Just leave. If you act rudely again, I won't hold back.
Jokre, feeling the pressure of death, wobbled on the ice, unable to keep his balance.
He would have fallen if Rudvans hadn't come to support him.

blocks.speaker: Rudvans
blocks.content: Let's go. We're official mages. If we cause trouble here, we'll be the ones at a disadvantage.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Hmph! Arrogant brats! Let's see how well you do.
Jokre continued to curse until the end.
But as Rudvans pulled him away by the collar, he only looked more pathetic.
It was only after Jokre's group had completely left the skating rink that Shirone sheathed Armand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hey, no matter how angry you are, you shouldn't swing a sword.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: You're kidding, right? This is all your fault! Why did you have to provoke them? What about my coat? You have to pay for it!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Let's move somewhere else. People are watching. The guards might come.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: How about we go to a café and have some coffee? Since I helped, you guys can treat me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why should we buy you coffee? And aren't you already drinking coffee?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: This is iced coffee. Let's go get something warm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you a coffee addict?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: No, I'm a coffee enthusiast.
Shirone and his friends found a café called 'Cozy Teahouse' in the shopping district and went inside.
As the warmth enveloped them, their cheeks turned rosy.
Shirone sat at a table and took out a sewing kit.
Dante picked up the menu.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: When you travel, you should try the local specialties. Let's see, 'Warm Ice Queen Coffee'? That's a strange name.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Skip the weird ones. I'll just have orange juice.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Alright? Then I'll have the Warm Ice Queen Coffee. Shirone, what about you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll have hot cocoa.
